log.summary: Initialized LLM-owned context changelog
log.rationale: Establish cross-agent visibility: every AI change logged here so any future agent knows what was done, why, and by whom.
log.outcome: Changelog file created with v1 schema. Rule updated to enforce mandatory append on every AI-driven change.

log.summary: Generate offline Figma asset manifest and enforce local-first rules
log.rationale: The user requested a full local-first workflow with Figma assets downloaded and reusable context/rules so future implementation does not depend on repeated MCP lookups.
log.outcome: Downloaded 46 Figma assets into the public folder, generated a node/style-to-path manifest, documented the offline workflow, and updated mirrored agent rules to prioritize local manifest usage.

log.summary: Extract full page/section Figma node map for all 6 routes (Home, Produtos, Produto, Sobre, Suporte, 404)
log.rationale: User requested a full audit and re-extraction of Figma context so all AI/docs files accurately reflect the complete website design. Previous meta.json lacked page-level node IDs; DESIGN_SYSTEM_REFERENCE.md lacked layout tokens and typography table.
log.outcome: meta.json now contains page-to-nodeId map for all 6 routes (desktop+mobile frames). New PAGES_REFERENCE.md documents every section per page with nodeId, background, and key components. DESIGN_SYSTEM_REFERENCE.md updated with precise layout tokens, color table, typography styles, and image asset map.

log.summary: Add autonomous POC loop custom agent
log.rationale: User requested a dedicated orchestrator agent to run the project task pipeline continuously with branch-per-activity behavior and autonomous review/refinement cycles.
log.outcome: Workspace now includes a custom invocable agent focused on continuous docs/ia/tasks orchestration, subagent-assisted execution, branch isolation, and backlog regeneration when exhausted.

log.summary: Create 12 task files with task-NN naming, Priority field and correct branch names
log.rationale: User requested task files renamed from POC-NN to task-NN prefix, with Priority field added and branch names updated to feat/task-NN-* convention.
log.outcome: All 12 task files use task-NN naming with Priority, Status, Branch, Acceptance Criteria and Implementation Notes. TASKS.md index updated to match.

log.summary: Integrate manageable content with mock API and prune raw Figma assets
log.rationale: User requested cleaning unused raw Figma assets and ensuring all developed manageable content is served through the existing mock API and hook integration flow.
log.outcome: Home, about, support and catalog hero/section copy now come from payload contracts via API/hooks; timeline local fallback data was removed; raw asset folder was reduced to referenced files and manifest/meta totals were synchronized.

log.summary: Expand orchestrator into multi-subagent autonomous delivery loop
log.rationale: User confirmed continuous execution policy, required multiple subagents, task generation constrained to docs/ia/tasks, and automatic commit push PR handling.
log.outcome: Workspace now has a delegated custom-agent architecture where the orchestrator coordinates planning, implementation, quality refinement, and Git/PR automation until tasks and refinements are exhausted.

log.summary: Add reusable prompt to trigger exhaustive orchestrator loop
log.rationale: User requested a reusable slash prompt that consistently starts continuous and exhaustive execution with the orchestrator workflow.
log.outcome: Workspace now has a dedicated prompt that invokes Orquestrador POC Loop with explicit continuous-loop, subagent delegation, task-only refinement generation, and automated commit push PR behavior.

log.summary: Implement Task 01: Layout Primitives and Figma Alignment
log.rationale: Align layout primitives (Container, Button, SectionLabel) with Figma design tokens and replace manual paddings with standardized Container component across all site pages.
log.outcome: Container now uses 170px/32px padding; Button has pill variant and sm/md sizes; SectionLabel supports dark mode; all main pages and components migrated to use Container.

log.summary: Rename poc-* skills to next-task/refine-design/create-task and add deliver orchestrator skill
log.rationale: User requested skill renames to remove poc- prefix and creation of deliver orchestrator skill for full-cycle delivery
log.outcome: Skills discoverable by cleaner names; deliver skill chains next-task→create-pr→code-review automatically

log.summary: Remove unused cn import and replace arbitrary RGB colors with design tokens
log.rationale: Code review identified: unused cn import in faq.tsx triggers lint error; bg-[rgb(31,31,31)], text-[rgb(184,184,184)], text-[rgb(102,102,102)] violate Tailwind v4 design token convention
log.outcome: Lint error resolved; three new tokens (surface-elevated, text-subtle, text-subtle-dark) added to @theme in globals.css; components now use semantic token classes

log.summary: Enrich catalog mock data with realistic specs, badges, and VIDEO product block
log.rationale: Task-12 acceptance criteria require valid spec keys in Portuguese, badge fields on Product type, and at least one VIDEO block for product with video_url
log.outcome: Mock catalog has correct Portuguese spec key names, LANÇAMENTO/DESTAQUE badges on 4 products, and VIDEO block for prod-st-4000eq-4c satisfying all 6 acceptance criteria

log.summary: Improve create-pr skill to mark task DONE and update context.json on PR creation
log.rationale: User requested skill improvement to automate task lifecycle management after PR creation
log.outcome: create-pr skill now includes Step 5 — marks related task as DONE and appends changelog entry post-PR

log.summary: Add copy-paste PR preview and A/B user prompt before gh pr create in create-pr skill
log.rationale: User requested skill show PR title/body as copy-paste blocks and ask whether to create PR online or run code-review first before proceeding
log.outcome: create-pr skill restructured to 7 steps: Step 4 presents copy-paste blocks, Step 5 asks A/B choice, Step 6 runs gh pr create, Step 7 marks task DONE

log.summary: Add theme token rule to block hardcoded colors
log.rationale: The user asked to codify a permanent rule that keeps UI work aligned with the official shadcn theme and avoids hardcoded color values like text-[#000000] across the app.
log.outcome: Both agent runtimes now have a shared theme-token rule that prefers semantic theme variables and rejects arbitrary color values for consistent UI implementation.

log.summary: Align Header with Figma fidelity — typography, pill button, mobile border
log.rationale: task-02 requires aligning Header to Figma nodes 1200:4585 (desktop) / 1200:4305 (mobile): nav link color/weight, Garantia button shape, and mobile border color
log.outcome: Nav links use Barlow Regular 18px #565656; Garantia button is rounded-full bg-brand-dark; mobile border is border-[#999999]; all 6 acceptance criteria met

log.summary: Install theme-tokens rule in .claude/rules and create task-13 for design token foundation
log.rationale: theme-tokens.md existed only in .agents/rules (not loaded by Claude Code CLI); task-13 created to eliminate all hardcoded color values and centralize design tokens in globals.css
log.outcome: Rule now dual-installed; task-13 queued on feat/task-02-header-figma-fidelity branch with 8 token mappings and acceptance criteria

log.summary: Implement task-13: remap shadcn tokens to Stetsom values and eliminate all hardcoded color/size classes
log.rationale: User requested token system to follow shadcn pattern: remap existing semantic tokens (--muted-foreground, --card, --muted) to Stetsom values; move inline @theme tokens to :root → var() pattern; add typography/spacing utilities. No new arbitrary color tokens created.
log.outcome: Zero hardcoded color classes remain in src/. shadcn tokens remapped: --muted-foreground=#565656, --card=#F8F8F8, --muted=#F0F0F0. Custom tokens follow :root→@theme pattern. Typography tokens text-2xs/text-button-md/text-display-* and spacing gap-logo-nav available. pnpm tsc passes.

log.summary: Replace all remaining arbitrary dimension values with Tailwind v4 canonical classes
log.rationale: User requested all VS Code IntelliSense canonical-class suggestions be applied (e.g. h-[45px]→h-11.25, px-[170px]→px-42.5) and eslint-plugin-tailwindcss removed as it crashed on pnpm due to worker-thread resolution failure with Tailwind v4
log.outcome: No arbitrary dimension values remain in source files. eslint.config.mjs cleaned of broken plugin import. pnpm tsc and pnpm lint pass on source files.

log.summary: Add styling-practices rule and correct tailwind-canonical with v4 decimal support
log.rationale: tailwind-canonical.md incorrectly listed non-multiples-of-4 as exceptions; Tailwind v4 supports any decimal so ALL px dimensions are canonical. New styling-practices.md codifies the full decision tree for colors, dimensions, font sizes, and token creation.
log.outcome: Agents now have a master styling checklist. tailwind-canonical.md corrected with decimal examples (h-11.25, px-42.5, h-0.75). tailwind-v4.md Container note updated to current values.

log.summary: Add CI workflow configured with pnpm for GitHub Actions
log.rationale: User requested creation of CI workflow file based on template but adapted for pnpm and Next.js.
log.outcome: A workflow file `.github/workflows/ci.yml` has been added. It provisions node 20, uses pnpm v9 via setup-pnpm, typechecks, lints, and builds the project on push and PRs.

log.summary: Add pre-commit hook using husky and lint-staged
log.rationale: User requested a lightweight pre-commit hook to prevent committing code with errors, specifically avoiding heavy builds.
log.outcome: Configured husky and lint-staged in package.json and created an executable pre-commit hook that runs `pnpm lint-staged` and typechecking (`pnpm tsc --noEmit`).

log.summary: Fix missing packages field in pnpm-workspace.yaml causing GitHub Actions failure
log.rationale: The GitHub Actions workflow failed during setup-node's pnpm caching step because pnpm-workspace.yaml lacked a 'packages' field, breaking 'pnpm store path'.
log.outcome: Added 'packages: [ "." ]' to pnpm-workspace.yaml, allowing setup-node to correctly cache pnpm dependencies.

log.summary: Fix TypeScript build errors causing CI checks to fail
log.rationale: Typescript checks failed in CI due to missing '/produtos/[slug]' in static generated Routes, and an undefined global 'RouteContext' type used in the API.
log.outcome: Updated 'types/routes.d.ts' with the correct app routes constraint and standardized API route typed params to fix the build locally and in CI.

log.summary: Revert manual changes to types/routes.d.ts and fix dynamic route types
log.rationale: Code review identified modification of Next.js auto-generated file 'types/routes.d.ts' violated Next.js 16 conventions. Fixed CI route constraints directly in the components.
log.outcome: Reverted 'types/routes.d.ts' to auto-generation flow. Dynamic routes now safely type their params using explicit `{ params: Promise<{ ... }> }` standardizing for Next.js App Router.

log.summary: Remove pnpm-workspace.yaml, move ignoredBuiltDependencies to package.json, bump CI to pnpm v10, rewrite README
log.rationale: Project is not a monorepo; pnpm-workspace.yaml with packages:['.'] was a workaround for CI cache step; proper fix is package.json pnpm field; CI had pnpm v9 vs local v10 mismatch; README was default Next.js boilerplate
log.outcome: Clean non-workspace pnpm config; CI uses pnpm v10 matching local dev; README reflects actual project stack and conventions

log.summary: Implement task-03 footer fidelity for desktop and mobile
log.rationale: Task-03 required matching the Figma footer structure and spacing while keeping the component aligned with project token and responsive layout conventions.
log.outcome: Footer now uses exact desktop/mobile spacing, updated logo and social set, corrected navigation columns, and legal copyright row; task moved to REVIEW with all criteria checked.

log.summary: Implement task-04 hero gradient overlay and NossaHistoria desktop gap
log.rationale: Task-04 requested Figma-accurate Home Hero gradient/text overlay and desktop spacing adjustments while preserving responsive behavior and existing design tokens.
log.outcome: Hero now uses the exact gradient and optional slide copy overlay, mock slide data includes label/title, NossaHistoria desktop layout applies 91px-equivalent gap, and task-04 is in REVIEW with all criteria checked.

log.summary: Implement task-05 tabs filtering and home bases section
log.rationale: Task-05 required client-side filtering in Novidades plus Home payload enrichment with bases data while preserving existing component parity and responsive structure.
log.outcome: Home now filters featured products by active tab, renders Nossas Bases after the dark section with white background, uses off-white social background, and exposes bases in SiteHomePayload mock data.

log.summary: Fix ARIA roles, extract TabStrip, add empty state, replace bg-white token in task-05 components
log.rationale: Code review on feat/task-05-home-novidades-tabs-bases identified: aria-pressed misuse on tab buttons, duplicated tab strip markup, missing empty state for filtered grid, and hardcoded bg-white on NossasBases instead of semantic token
log.outcome: Tab buttons now use role=tab+aria-selected under role=tablist; TabStrip extracted as subcomponent eliminating duplicate; empty state shown when filter returns no products; NossasBases background uses bg-off-white token

log.summary: Fix social-medias.tsx: replace span CTA with Link, use next/image for posts, remove non-functional carousel buttons
log.rationale: Code review flagged non-semantic span as CTA, backgroundImage bypassing next/image optimization, and non-functional Server Component carousel buttons
log.outcome: CTA uses next/link with ctaHref, post images use next/image with fill, carousel buttons removed from Server Component

log.summary: Remove redundant className='bg-off-white' from NossasBases in home page
log.rationale: NossasBases already applies bg-off-white unconditionally in its own className; passing it from page.tsx was duplicate and violated DRY principle
log.outcome: NossasBases rendered without redundant prop; visual output unchanged

log.summary: Implement task-06 products hero gradient and catalog filters alignment
log.rationale: Task-06 required Figma-aligned products hero treatment and verification of existing filters/search/thumb data without regressing responsive grid behavior.
log.outcome: Products page hero now uses the required radial and fade gradients with desktop height at 336px and watermark alignment, criteria were checked, and task moved to REVIEW.

log.summary: Implement task-07 product detail page with breadcrumb blocks and related products
log.rationale: The next-task workflow selected task-07, which required replacing the debug product detail page with a Figma-aligned implementation and mocked related products support.
log.outcome: The product detail route now renders navigable breadcrumb, radial hero with centered product image, styled TEXT/IMAGE blocks, placeholders for out-of-scope block types, and a 4-card related products grid; task-07 moved to REVIEW with all criteria checked.

log.summary: Regenerate types/routes.d.ts with /produtos/[slug] route for CI compatibility
log.rationale: Code review via /code-review skill found TypeScript errors in CI due to stale types/routes.d.ts missing /produtos/[slug] route. File must exist in repo root (not just .next/types/) for CI environments without .next cache.
log.outcome: Copied types/routes.d.ts from .next/types/routes.d.ts post-build; now includes all routes (/, /admin, /cms, /produtos, /produtos/[slug], /sobre, /suporte) with correct ParamMap; pnpm tsc --noEmit and pnpm lint both pass

log.summary: Implement task-08 sobre page with hero height, marquee banner, and dark gallery using react-fast-marquee
log.rationale: Task-08 requires: Hero height 439px with radial overlay, RedBanner with seamless marquee loop respecting design padding, GaleriaDark section after Timeline with semantic color token.
log.outcome: Installed react-fast-marquee v1.6.5; RedBanner uses <Marquee gap={24}> to respect design padding between milestone items; updated Hero h-109.75 with radial gradient overlay; created GaleriaDark with bg-surface-elevated tokens; all 4 acceptance criteria met; pnpm tsc and lint pass.

log.summary: Implement task-09 factory section and social medias scroll controls
log.rationale: Task-09 required: create NossaFabrica component with factory image and radial gradient overlay; implement scroll controls (ChevronLeft/Right) with smooth scrolling in MidiasSociais; integrate section into Sobre page.
log.outcome: Created NossaFabrica with fill_OJJ5Q1_b3596ec5.png image and radial-gradient overlay matching Figma spec; converted MidiasSociais to client component with useRef-based smooth scroll at ±300px per click; added section to page after MidiasSociais; all 5 acceptance criteria met; pnpm tsc and lint pass.

log.summary: Implement task-10 support page redesign with 8 sections
log.rationale: Task-10 required replacing placeholder /suporte page with Figma-aligned 8-section implementation: Hero with radial gradient dark overlay, watermark SOS, red bar; 3 support cards with red vertical decoration; documentation section with tabs; FAQ search with input and category filters; contact form with name/email/message fields; FAQ accordion with support button.
log.outcome: Redesigned /suporte page with all 8 sections: Hero at h-84 with gradient-dark-overlay and red accent bar; 3-column responsive grid of cards with vertical red borders; documentation tabs with filtered link grid; FAQ search section with input icon and category pills; contact form with 3 fields and submit button; FAQ accordion using shadcn Accordion component; all 6 acceptance criteria met; pnpm tsc and lint pass.

log.summary: Create 404 not-found page with Header, Footer and decorative 404 watermark
log.rationale: Task-11 required creating src/app/not-found.tsx faithful to Figma node 1200:7086 — bg-off-white content section, decorative 404 watermark at 8% opacity, Barlow Condensed Black title, Barlow Medium subtitle, and brand-red CTA button linking to home.
log.outcome: not-found.tsx renders at any invalid route with Header + Footer included; decorative 404 span at opacity-[0.08]; title in font-sans-condensed font-black uppercase at 50px; subtitle in text-text-subtle-dark; button navigates to /; all 7 acceptance criteria met; tsc and lint pass.

log.summary: Fix task-11 review issues with tokenized colors and canonical sizing
log.rationale: Code review flagged arbitrary color and sizing classes; user requested all issues fixed with no regressions and preference for existing theme tokens before adding new global variables.
log.outcome: Replaced hardcoded colors with existing semantic tokens, switched min height to canonical Tailwind class, updated stale /poc-refine-design reference, and kept 404 visual fidelity aligned with Figma intent.

log.summary: Refine all 6 site pages to match Figma Final Website design: produtos sidebar, slug tabs, specs table, suporte map
log.rationale: Design pass against live Figma (fileKey huD41oTL0FAa7xsNEK8tAM, node 1200:4302): produtos needed desktop sidebar layout; produto selecionado needed tab bar + specs table + product preview redesign; suporte needed map/location section
log.outcome: Produtos now shows sidebar+grid on desktop; produto selecionado has tab switching between Especificacoes (hero+table+blocks) and Confira Tambem (related products); suporte has map photo section; Figma URL added to PAGES_REFERENCE

log.summary: Run full Figma fidelity pass with desktop/mobile comparison and apply high-impact visual corrections across site pages
log.rationale: User requested a complete design-fidelity review against the Figma final website, including desktop/mobile screenshots, concrete deviation correction, mock data enrichment, and token-safe styling adjustments.
log.outcome: Implemented Figma-aligned improvements for products filters/grid density, product detail hierarchy (metrics/actions/visao geral), support hero/cards, about hero stats composition, and 404 cleanup; enriched mock catalog to realistic product breadth; TypeScript and lint checks pass and post-fix screenshots confirm improved visual parity.

log.summary: Execute Phase 1-6 design fidelity corrections and baseline visual export
log.rationale: User authorized start of Item 2 implementation: execute all design corrections identified in audit, normalize button component sizing, update product card styling with semantic tokens, apply dark mode to Qualidade Inovadora section, fix tab styling in Novidades, normalize watermark sizing for mobile-first responsive approach, and export visual baselines from Figma for final validation.
log.outcome: Phase 1 (Foundation): Button sizes normalized sm/md/lg (h-8/h-10/h-12), ProductCard border/shadow tokens fixed, figma-sm variant removed and migrated to sm. Phase 2 (Home): Qualidade Inovadora changed to dark bg with dark SectionLabel prop, Novidades tabs use border-b instead of bg-zinc-100. Phase 5 (Watermarks): Produtos and Suporte watermarks use mobile-first sizing (text-[80px] sm:text-[150px] lg:text-[263px]). Phase 8 (Baselines): 6 Figma frames exported to public/figma-design/ as PNG reference. All pages render successfully; tsc and lint pass. Dev server confirmed operational on localhost:3000.

log.summary: Add design-fidelity-audit skill and reorganize Figma baseline images into per-page subfolders
log.rationale: Codify full-site Figma audit methodology as reusable dual-install skill; organize baseline PNGs by page for easier per-page design comparison
log.outcome: Skill available in both VS Code Copilot and Claude Code CLI runtimes; all 6 pages have desktop+mobile Figma baseline images in per-page subfolders under .raw/figma-design/

log.summary: Design fidelity audit — fix all token divergences across 12 files
log.rationale: Full design fidelity audit: font-weight divergences (font-bold/font-medium → font-black in Barlow Condensed uppercase contexts), color token divergences (bg-white → bg-card, bg-zinc-200 → bg-muted, text-zinc-400 → text-icon-muted, hover:bg-zinc-800 → hover:bg-surface-elevated), semantic border tokens applied where applicable, and canonical Tailwind sizing for map height.
log.outcome: All Barlow Condensed uppercase headings now use font-black; background surfaces use semantic tokens; hover/placeholder colors use design system tokens; product and support pages now follow Stetsom Tailwind token conventions.

log.summary: Design fidelity audit — 8 corrections across header, suporte, sobre, novidades
log.rationale: Full-site Figma fidelity audit: nav trigger hover/padding fix, suporte hero size/cards padding/FAQ button/bar, sobre hero title red word + stats label size, novidades tab font size
log.outcome: Header nav trigger aligned, suporte hero heading at 90px, support cards at p-4, sobre POTENCIA in brand red, stats labels at text-sm, novidades tabs at 18px Medium

log.summary: Render '+' in stat values (35+, 200+, 60+, 1M+) in brand red on sobre hero
log.rationale: Figma ts5 fill for '+' character in hero stats is #E8132A (brand red), while number portion is white; current code rendered entire stat.value as plain white text
log.outcome: Stat values split at '+': number portion stays text-white, '+' wrapped in <span className='text-brand'> matching Figma reference

log.summary: Add Product Data Schema and Mock API guideline rules (dual-install)
log.rationale: Codify the Product Data Schema as the contract and require mock API payloads to follow it until backend integration.
log.outcome: Dual-installed rules ensure agents and developers use the same contract and mock provider until backend exists.

log.summary: Simplify and modularize branch: extract product utils, useHorizontalScroll hook, ContactForm, BlockRenderer
log.rationale: Reduce large files via componentization, eliminate inline utils by centralizing in product.ts, fix 10 products violating schema (missing required blocks).
log.outcome: product-detail-tabs.tsx reduced from 299 to ~200 lines; 10 mock products now have at least one block; scroll logic centralized in reusable hook; contact form extracted as subcomponent.

log.summary: Design fidelity audit — 12 corrections across 8 files covering HIGH/MED/LOW divergences
log.rationale: Full-site design fidelity audit against fresh Figma baseline exports (12 frames). HIGH: GaleriaDark had 6 empty placeholders → real brand images; NossaFabrica desktop had placeholder text → Image+address content; Suporte section 4 was wrong layout (map+FAQ categories) → POSTOS AUTORIZADOS section; Suporte contact was single-column form → 2-column with contact info. MED: leading-[74px] → leading-18.5 in suporte/produtos heroes; h-[358px]/w-[447px]/max-w-[476px] → canonical in produto-selecionado; NossasBases bg-off-white → bg-white; Produtos category tabs now show thumbnail images. LOW: Novidades bg-card → bg-white; NossaHistoria adds stats grid (35+/200+/60+/1M+); Produtos mobile adds Comparar button.
log.outcome: All 12 divergences resolved. tsc --noEmit and lint pass with zero errors. 12 Figma baseline PNGs refreshed in .raw/figma-design/.

log.summary: Fix all code-review issues: XSS sanitization, cn() consistency, contact form interactivity, manual link guard, hardcoded counts
log.rationale: Code review identified 5 issues: dangerouslySetInnerHTML without sanitization (XSS risk), template literal conditional classes instead of cn(), non-functional contact form submit, manual download link falling back to #, hardcoded count badges showing incorrect data
log.outcome: HTML blocks sanitized via DOMPurify; timeline uses cn() for all conditional classes; contact form has working submit with success state; manual link hidden when no file; filter count badges removed. tsc and lint pass.

log.summary: Modularize catalog, product tabs, timeline, novidades, support data and API query params
log.rationale: The user asked to resume a paused modularization plan and continue from the last completed step while preserving behavior and avoiding mock-layer rewrites.
log.outcome: Catalog page now uses extracted sidebar/mobile filters, product tabs consume external BlockRenderer, timeline and novidades use extracted subcomponents, support constants moved to data module, API query-string builders were centralized, and shared about stats now come from one source. Build passed after fixing a missing import.

log.summary: Overhaul multi-agent AI setup: slim CLAUDE.md, enrich AGENTS.md, install graphify skill dual-side, fix stale TASKS.md ref
log.rationale: CLAUDE.md was bloated with content duplicated from AGENTS.md (via @AGENTS.md include) and missing graphify-out/ context, skills inventory, and multi-agent coordination note; graphify-out/ directory existed but no doc told agents to use it; TASKS.md had stale /poc-next-task reference
log.outcome: CLAUDE.md is now lean (skills table, graphify-out reference, multi-agent note); AGENTS.md has Knowledge Graph, AI Workflow, and Cross-Agent Changelog sections; graphify skill installed in both .claude/ and .agents/ with Stetsom-specific context; TASKS.md command references corrected

log.summary: Enforce naming conventions: English identifiers, kebab-case files across entire codebase
log.rationale: Project rule requires all code-level identifiers in English with kebab-case file names; 26 violations were found including 9 Portuguese component exports, 6 PascalCase filenames, Portuguese union discriminators, and Portuguese contract field names
log.outcome: All component exports, file names, props interfaces, Tab discriminators, and contract fields are now in English; pnpm build passes with zero TypeScript errors

log.summary: Rebuild docs/ia/figma/ from scratch: delete raw dumps, extract fresh Figma context, create distilled DESIGN_SYSTEM/PAGES/COMPONENTS docs
log.rationale: docs/ia/figma/ had 1.8MB of raw Figma dumps (context.json 1.5MB, design-system.json 172KB, asset-candidates 59KB) that were too heavy and confusing for agents. User requested a clean rebuild: extract fresh Figma data via Framelink MCP, distill into code-first tables (Figma style → CSS var → Tailwind class), map every component to its React file, remove all raw dumps.
log.outcome: Folder reduced from 1.8MB (8 files) to ~60KB (4 files). DESIGN_SYSTEM.md has full color/typography/spacing/effects tables with direct Tailwind class mapping. PAGES.md maps every page section to its Figma node ID and React component file. COMPONENTS.md maps every Figma component to its React implementation. meta.json is now minimal JSON only. Rules updated to reference new file names.

log.summary: Macro design system audit: fix text-zinc-50, hover:bg-zinc-800 and watermark token mismatches
log.rationale: Full audit against DESIGN_SYSTEM.md: zinc-50 not in color table (use text-white); hover:bg-zinc-800 lightens dark button inconsistently (use hover:bg-brand-dark); produtos watermark used text-white instead of text-watermark-text; 404 watermark used text-icon-muted (#767676) instead of DESIGN_SYSTEM-specified #878787
log.outcome: Brand/brand-dark buttons use text-white and hover semantically darkens. Watermarks now use correct token (text-watermark-text) or Figma-exact value (text-[#878787]). All border-zinc-200, rounded-[4px], text-[Npx] exceptions confirmed correct per DESIGN_SYSTEM and left unchanged.

log.summary: Fix typography token precedence in @theme inline — move --text-* declarations to end of block
log.rationale: shadcn/tailwind.css and tw-animate-css can define --text-* variables in their own @theme blocks; since multiple @theme blocks are merged, last declaration wins — project typography tokens must be declared last to not be overridden.
log.outcome: text-display-sm, text-section-title and other custom font-size tokens now correctly apply; styling-practices rule documents the required declaration order to prevent future regressions.

log.summary: Design fidelity audit — complete remaining 7 divergences from interrupted session
log.rationale: Completed the pending items from the interrupted /design-fidelity-audit session. HIGH: [slug]/page.tsx hero bg changed from bg-card (#F4F4F4) to bg-[#F8F8F8] per PAGES.md; inline manual link changed from text-zinc-50 to text-white; product-detail-tabs.tsx reordered blocks before specs to match Figma. H4: suporte/page.tsx sections reordered to Figma spec (Docs → FAQ → Contato), Postos Autorizados removed (not in PAGES.md), Documentação refactored to DOWNLOAD DE MATERIAIS with ProductFile[] schema. MED: thumbnails and download button border-zinc-300→zinc-200; our-foundations.tsx py-20→py-12. LOW: download button font-black→font-semibold; our-history.tsx stats text-3xl→text-display-sm.
log.outcome: 7 divergences fixed across 8 files. [slug]/page.tsx: 5 corrections (H1 bg, H2 text, M1 border, M2 border, L1 weight). product-detail-tabs.tsx: blocks rendered before specs (H3). suporte section order corrected to Figma spec (H4). Postos Autorizados removed. Documentation refactored to file list with ProductFile schema. Mock aligned to backend type. tsc --noEmit and pnpm lint both exit 0.

log.summary: Design fidelity audit Phase 5 — implement all 9 divergences (HIGH/MED/LOW/DOCS)
log.rationale: Full-site design fidelity audit against Figma baseline: HIGH — our-history.tsx image was inside Container adding left padding; Figma requires flush-left image (no left padding, right padding only at 170px). MED — sobre page had DarkGallery before OurFoundations (wrong order). MED — suporte sections were in wrong order (Documentation → Postos → Contact → FAQ) and Documentation/Contact used bg-card instead of bg-white. MED — not-found.tsx h1 used text-footer (Footer bg color) instead of text-brand-dark; missing CTA button. MED — product detail thumbnails were h-16 w-18 (non-square) instead of ~76px square. log.outcome: our-history.tsx restructured to flush-left desktop layout (w-182.75 = 731px image, pl-22.75 = 91px gap, pr-42.5 = 170px right padding). sobre/page.tsx swapped OurFoundations before DarkGallery. suporte/page.tsx reordered to Contact → Postos → Documentation → FAQ with bg-white on Contact and Documentation. not-found.tsx h1 uses text-brand-dark; brand CTA button added via buttonVariants+Link. produto slug thumbnails h-19 w-19 (square 76px). spec tags rounded-[12px] border-muted. PAGES.md corrected for home section 4 (OurHistory) and sobre section 7 (OurFoundations). pnpm tsc --noEmit and pnpm lint both exit 0.

log.summary: Configure tailwind-merge to recognize custom font-size tokens (text-display-*, text-section-title, text-2xs, text-button-md)
log.rationale: cn() used raw twMerge which doesn't know about Tailwind v4 @theme custom text-* tokens (--text-display-sm, etc.). When merging text-display-sm with text-brand-dark, tailwind-merge treated both as unknown text-* classes and dropped the font-size. Fix: use extendTailwindMerge with theme.text array listing all custom text tokens.
log.outcome: Changed twMerge import to extendTailwindMerge with custom text tokens. tsc --noEmit exits 0.
